user_query: My friend is planning to adopt a pet and wants to know the inventory status of the pet store. Fetch the inventory details and provide the quantities for different items. Additionally, check the exclusiveness status for my friend to see if they are already exclusive.

TaskList.description: Fetch the inventory details from the pet store to get information on various items available and their quantities.
Check the exclusiveness status for my friend to determine if they are already exclusive or not. This may involve checking the user's profile or account information.
